category_sources: source_facts.description says GNOME hex editor; official GNOME wiki says GHex lets users view and edit files in hex or ASCII.
display_name_sources: Official GNOME wiki and GNOME help pages use GHex; source_facts.name is ghex.
docs_sources: Official GNOME Library hosts the GHex user manual; official GNOME wiki page is the app page and links source and project details.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo was empty; official GNOME wiki lists https://gitlab.gnome.org/GNOME/ghex as the Git Repository and clone source.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies GNOME hex editor; official GNOME wiki and manual describe editing binary files in hexadecimal and ASCII.
